g.onclick: sendPrompt('What full permissions does the Owner have?')
g.text: Full access — schools, users, billing, analytics

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can a Coordinator do that a Supervisor cannot?')
g.text: Manage classes, assign lectors, schedule courses

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What monitoring rights does a Supervisor have?')
g.text: View class data, attendance, assessment reports

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can a Lector create and edit?')
g.text: Create curriculum, deliver lessons, record grades

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can a Parent view in Talkin.sk?')
sendPrompt('What can a Student access in Talkin.sk?')

svg.text: Each tier inherits read access from all tiers below it.
Write/admin rights are additive upward only.
